title: stellaria media subsp. neglecta
intro: Stellaria media subsp. neglecta, also known as Common Chickweed or Starwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and minor burns, as well as alleviate digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Common Chickweed can be prepared as a tea, salve, or tincture, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions, or taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
